# Tax Trigger Keywords

## Skill Activation

- tax
- taxes
- tax calculation
- tax rule
- tax rate
- tax fee
- ITaxCalculator
- ApplyTax
- CalculateTax

## Concern Routing Keywords

- Business route:
  - policy, rules, fee types, inclusive, exclusive, seasonal, configuration
- Developer route:
  - class, method, interface, algorithm, implementation, code, parser
- Shopping route:
  - shopping, availability, storefront, search results, pricing pipeline
- Full route:
  - full overview, full audit, all guides, end-to-end tax explanation

## Guard Keywords (route away)

- ohip, oracle hospitality, eventhandler, neweventtype -> ohip skill
- architect, archon, ad2, adr, son, srd -> architect skill
- review, checklist, standards, pr review -> reviewnet skill
- nomenclature, app id, synxisnom -> synxisnom skill
